title: Inferno World
description: Dimension, epic boss battle, and tools inspired by a magical hell
body:
I made this datapack to add an “extra adventure” with powerful items that can help in a regular game.
The adventure will be about you, alone or with friends, discovering new tools and using them to enter a new structure in the Nether in order to kill the Hovering Inferno.


**New nether underground structure**
![New nether underground structure ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78684c0e17b9b49b87e676a0e65a0d97a67fd972_0.webp)


**War traces dimension preview**
![war traces dimension preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d65bfebab4ea606f67da6c6f28657f27e6a4082_0.webp)
